title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Bewakoof

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Bewakoof
jsonLd.description:
Bewakoof invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bewakoof:
Bewakoof is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bewakoof!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
